evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Generative AI and Automation for Longevity and Sustainability ... transforming drug discovery and development with generative artificial intelligence"; from the Pipeline page: "DIVERSIFIED PIPELINE DISCOVERED USING PHARMA.AI" with disclosed targets (USP1, QPCTL, KAT6, MAT2A, TEAD, ENPP1) that are small-molecule targets; products listed are software (PandaOmics, Chemistry42, Generative Biologics, inClinico).
disqualifier_reason: AI/computational-discovery-only with no antibody program; pipeline is small-molecule and platform is generative-AI software

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "what separates us from any other contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO)"; services are Drug Substance (small-molecule API), Tides ("manufacturing of peptides and oligonucleotides"), Highly Potent APIs, Controlled Substances, and Drug Product. No antibody/biologics drug-substance (mammalian cell culture) capability disclosed.
disqualifier_reason: small-molecule / peptide-oligo CDMO with no antibody bioprocessing

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Pure-play Cell Therapy CDMO and Gene Therapy CDMO delivering process development, cGMP manufacturing, and commercial supply" plus a "Biosafety Testing Laboratory" for "mAbs, viral vaccines, and advanced therapies." Antibody appears only as a testing substrate, not as a program they develop or manufacture.
disqualifier_reason: cell-therapy / gene-therapy CDMO plus biosafety testing lab; no antibody bioprocessing/manufacturing program

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Jubilant HollisterStier CMO provides comprehensive sterile fill-finish and lyophilization services"; services listed are Sterile Fill-Finish, Lyophilization, Inspection and Packaging, Support Services. This is drug-product fill-finish, not antibody drug-substance bioprocessing.
disqualifier_reason: sterile fill-finish CMO (drug product only); no antibody bioprocessing/drug-substance program

programs: TRB-061 (TNFR2 agonist), TRB-071, TRB-081, TRB-051 (Lilly-partnered); Deep Biology Platform
evidence_quote: From the Pipeline page: "TRexBio is advancing a differentiated pipeline of biologics ... Our pipeline of large molecules"; from the TRB-061 page: "TRB-061 mimics the natural TNF ligand to selectively activate effector Tregs." Clearly a large-molecule/biologics developer, but no page names the format as an antibody, bispecific, ADC, or Fc-fusion; a TNFR2 agonist that 'mimics the natural TNF ligand' could be a ligand-mimetic/Fc-fusion rather than a genuine antibody, so the in-scope modality cannot be confirmed.
disqualifier_reason: none
na_site_reasoning: program gate not passed (program is unclear); NA presence noted: South San Francisco CA R&D would qualify if program confirmed

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Culture's cloud-connected bioreactors for cell culture experiments" and products Console ("bioprocess management software in the cloud"), Nexxys, and Stratyx ("Bioreactor platform"). They sell bioreactor hardware and bioprocess-development software/services, not antibody therapeutics or antibody CDMO bioprocessing.
disqualifier_reason: bioreactor hardware + bioprocess software vendor (equipment/tools supplier); no antibody program

evidence_quote: From the Biomanufacturing Services page: "Our primary focus is viral vector manufacturing"; from the homepage: "producing and testing today's leading oncolytic viruses, gene therapies, immunotherapies, viral vaccines, and recombinant protein vaccines." Product types are viral vectors (AAV, lentivirus, adenovirus, VSV, etc.); no antibody bioprocessing disclosed.
disqualifier_reason: viral-vector / vaccine CDMO; no antibody bioprocessing program

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "We are a personalized CDMO" with services Drug Product Fill Finish ("manufacturing sterile injectable products"), Combination Drug Product Assembly, Drug Development & Analytical Services, and Drug Delivery Design. Injectable fill-finish CDMO, not antibody drug-substance bioprocessing.
disqualifier_reason: injectable fill-finish CDMO (drug product only); no antibody bioprocessing program

programs: none disclosed (Therapure Biomanufacturing biologics CDMO; Therapure Innovations protein therapeutics for liver cancer/anemia/hepatitis C; Evolve Biologics plasma-derived therapeutics)

From the Innovations section: "developing innovative protein therapeutics in liver cancer, anemia and hepatitis C." From the Biologics section: "deliver critical plasma-derived therapeutics." No antibody-based ngAbs program disclosed; the live site has additionally decayed into off-topic SEO blog content (skincare, Minecraft), reducing confidence.

programs: none disclosed (solid, sterile, semi-solid and liquid dose-form drug manufacturing; prefilled syringes, nasal spray, liquid products)

programs: none disclosed (industrial automation / integration solutions for biopharma manufacturing equipment)

programs: none disclosed (Chroniject sustained-release microsphere / long-acting injectable CDMO for small molecules, peptides, proteins)

programs: none disclosed (custom peptide API process development and GMP manufacturing; now a CordenPharma company)

programs: none disclosed (sterile injectable fill-finish for liquid/lyophilized vials, syringes, cartridges)

Pure fill-finish; no upstream/downstream antibody bioprocessing of the drug substance.

programs: CDMO mammalian (CHO) expression platform supporting monoclonal antibodies and Fc-fusion proteins, with biosimilarity/comparability frameworks; also bioreagents, Bio-APIs (enzymes), peptides, biosimilars

This is a stated antibody-based bioprocessing service capability (Fc-fusion + mAb), though disclosed shipped products are non-antibody enzymes/peptides.

na_site_reasoning: Provis is a WHO-GMP, animal-origin-free manufacturer presenting as serving North America/Europe/Asia but with no physical North American (US/Canada/Mexico) wet-lab, process-dev, or GMP manufacturing site disclosed on the site; presence reads as an exporter serving NA rather than operating there.

programs: none disclosed (drug-device combination CDMO: injectable, inhalation/pulmonary, nasal, dermal/transdermal; device manufacture + sterile fill-finish + assembly)

From the Sterile injectables page: "Seamless integration of device manufacture, sterile fill finish and final assembly in one location." evidence_quote: From the homepage: "MeiraGTx is a clinical-stage genetic medicine company committed to harnessing the full potential of genetic therapies for both rare and prevalent diseases" and "Next-generation Vector Optimization" / "Transformative Riboswitch Technology" - the pipeline and platform are AAV gene therapy, not antibody-based.

evidence_quote: From the About Us page: "We seek to be the partner of choice for producing high-quality plasmid DNA, proteins, enzymes, and other biologicals" - a nucleic-acid/protein/enzyme reagent and CDMO supplier (plasmid DNA, mRNA, CRISPR nucleases), with no antibody-based therapeutic program or antibody bioprocessing service.

evidence_quote: From the About INCOG section: "INCOG BioPharma is a fill/finish CDMO providing end-to-end solutions for clinical through commercial phase sterile injectable drug products" - fill/finish only, no antibody drug-substance bioprocessing or antibody program.
disqualifier_reason: pure fill/finish CRO with no antibody bioprocessing

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "AmplifyBio is a concept to commercial CRO dedicated to providing expert services for drug discovery, characterization, optimization, in vitro and in vivo safety studies, and manufacturing for a broad range of drug modalities, including small molecule, cell and gene therapies, mRNA, and other biologics." No antibody-based program or antibody bioprocessing named; site also announces operations closure.

evidence_quote: From the Biomanufacturing page: "Reduce your footprint and operational costs with plug & play continuous biomanufacturing" and "Continuously isolate and purify antibodies using structural retention without filters" - Research-Use-Only bioprocessor hardware/platform vendor, not an antibody developer, manufacturer, or contract antibody bioprocessing service for a specific program.

evidence_quote: From the homepage (now Minaris): "Pure-play Cell Therapy CDMO and Gene Therapy CDMO delivering process development, cGMP manufacturing, and commercial supply" plus a biosafety/QC testing lab that lists "mAbs, recombinant proteins" only as testing clients - cell/gene-therapy manufacturing CDMO with antibody work limited to analytical testing, not antibody bioprocessing or an antibody program.

evidence_quote: From the Capabilities page: "With a focus on sterile injectable drug development and manufacturing" and manufacturing "utilizing fully isolated filling lines for vials, syringes, and IV bags" - a sterile injectable formulation and fill/finish CDMO, no antibody drug-substance bioprocessing or antibody program.

evidence_quote: From the Pipeline page: clinical/preclinical assets are SARM1 inhibitor (SIR2501), NAMPT activator (SIR4156), RIPK1 inhibitor (SIR9900) - small molecules - plus a preclinical "Brain Delivery Module (BDM)" delivery platform; no antibody-based molecule in the pipeline.

evidence_quote: From the homepage (Misión): "El objetivo de DRUGMEX es cubrir el servicio de Tercero o Contract Manufacturing (CMO) de productos inyectables estériles en las formas farmacéuticas liofilizados y soluciones en ampollas y viales, para consumo humano."

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Together as a team we can deliver end-to-end results for your oligonucleotide drug development program." and "Nitto Avecia Pharma Services is your single source for high-quality analytical testing services for the pharma, biotech, and medical device industries."

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "As a purpose-fueled drug delivery CDMO, we leverage our specialist injectable, inhalation and dermal expertise to accelerate your product's journey."
